title: Asset Specialist (Buyer)
description:
Responsibilities:

  • Part maintenance and parts adds to ensure accurate part mastering data.
  • Ensure daily purchases are made in a timely manner.
  • Maintains inventory within company goals and maximizes available to sell inventory through daily purchases.
  • Purchase orders pipelines and maximizing contractual stock rotation privileges with suppliers.
  • Review and buy stocking packages and New Product Introduction (NPI) packages request from key stakeholders.
  • Set and review write-off to move aging inventories.
  • Audits daily receipts from warehouses and resolves accounting and receiving discrepancies.

Requirements

  • Min. Diploma or Degree holder with at least 3 years relevant experience in electronics components
  • Team player & able to communicate with all levels
  • Good attitude, responsible, diligent and willing to learn
  • Able to multi-task and work under pressure in a fast- paced environment
  • Proficient in MS Office Applications, especially MS Excel

postedCompany.description:
TTI ELECTRONICS ASIA PTE LTD

TTI is a wholly-owned subsidiary of Berkshire Hathaway, Inc.

Headquartered in Fort Worth, Texas, TTI, Inc. is the world’s leading authorized distributor specialist offering passive, connector, electromechanical and discrete components. TTI’s extensive product line and supply chain solutions have made the company the distributor of choice for industrial, automotive, and data-communications electronic manufacturers worldwide. 　

TTI’s extensive product line includes: resistors, capacitors, connectors, discretes, potentiometers, trimmers, magnetic and circuit protection components, wire and cable, wire management, identification products, application tools, and electromechanical devices. These products are distributed from a broad line of top blue chip manufacturers. TTI strives to be the industry’s leader, stocking the latest IP&E component and supporting our customers’ requirements through our Outside Sales team and Local 　Field Application Engineers with technical seminars, and design support.6788

TTI’s products, personalized service and custom supply chain solutions have earned us the most preferred passives and connector distributor awards. TTI employs more than 3,800 people at more than 100 locations worldwide. Locally in Asia we have 3 dedicated inventory distribution centers in Shanghai, Hong Kong and Singapore respectively and more than 25 sales locations to support local customer needs in Greater China and South Asia.
